---
title: "wild_hunt.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\local\WildHunt\wild_hunt.py"
loc: 138
complexity: 28
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 4.88
overall_score: 1.19
---

## Intent
The `wild_hunt.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on WildHunt, __init__, _remove_readonly, search, is_trusted, ingest, _direct_ingest, _sandbox_ingest, _write_metadata. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via WildHunt, __init__, _remove_readonly, search, is_trusted, ingest, _direct_ingest, _sandbox_ingest, _write_metadata. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [stat](file://stat)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.shadow_forge](file://src.sentinel.wardens.shadow_forge)
- [time](file://time)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `WildHunt`
- `__init__`
- `_remove_readonly`
- `search`
- `is_trusted`
- `ingest`
- `_direct_ingest`
- `_sandbox_ingest`
- `_write_metadata`
